title: Chromatic Currents
description: A mod that adds in colored redstone!
body:
This mod adds in new types of dye based redstones!

to make the different colors of redstone just put any type of colored stone dust in a crafting table and add a dye and you will get the dust for that color!

redstones of different color will not connect to each other which lets you have much more complex redstone circuit's!
